title: Newly created disposables should not be discarded
messageFormat: This disposable object is created and immediately discarded without being disposed.
summary: Constructing an IDisposable as a standalone statement and ignoring the result leaks whatever it holds: a file handle, socket, or native buffer stays open until finalization, if it is reclaimed at all. The allocation had a side effect that is never undone.
Capture the instance in a using declaration or statement so it is disposed deterministically when the scope ends.
